calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Contribution, Indemnity, And Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS LORNA YUNG and LEA LOUIE'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Contribution, Indemnity, And Declaratory Relief.

Defendants Lea Louie and Lorna Yung's unopposed motion for leave to file cross-complaint is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order verbatim to the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID A. GOLDSTEIN, Esq. of Buchalter, APC (Tel: 415-227-0900) as movant/counsel-of-record for defendant Talbco Development Corporation dba Supreme Built;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT TALBCO DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, DBA SUPREME BUILT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matthew Covington, David Goldstein and Buchalter, APC's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
